title: Midnight Yogurt Stir-fry
description: An earthy and dense pescatarian-friendly dish featuring Greek yogurt, ferment, with a midnight craving appeal reminiscent of Kenyan cuisine.

ingredients.name: Fermented Vegetables (e.g., kimchi, sauerkraut)
ingredients.notes: Use a mild or non-spicy variety for this dish.

instructions: Chop the garlic and onion finely.
Mix Greek Yogurt with chopped garlic and onion in a large bowl.
Add fermented vegetables to yogurt mixture, stirring gently until well combined.
Serve hot or at room temperature as desired.
